info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/create \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"baseId":"string","type":"string","resourceId":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"baseId\":\"string\",\"type\":\"string\",\"resourceId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/create", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/%7BchatId%7D/messages \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/%7BchatId%7D/messages", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Stop an active chat stream and prevent resume

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/%7BchatId%7D/stop \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/%7BchatId%7D/stop", headers=headers)

get.description: Get onboarding scenarios with presigned URLs for attachments

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/chat/onboarding/scenarios \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/chat/onboarding/scenarios", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Get attachment info by tokens. Used for landing page onboarding flow.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/chat/onboarding/attachments \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"tokens":["string"]}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"tokens\":[\"string\"]}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/chat/onboarding/attachments", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/text-extract \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"attachments":[{"token":"string","name":"string","mimetype":"string","size":0,"path":"string","presignedUrl":"string"}]}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"attachments\":[{\"token\":\"string\",\"name\":\"string\",\"mimetype\":\"string\",\"size\":0,\"path\":\"string\",\"presignedUrl\":\"string\"}]}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/text-extract", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Execute TypeScript code in sandbox for chat tools

integrationIds.description: Integration IDs to inject into script context

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/execute-script \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"code":"string","input":{"property1":null,"property2":null},"integrationIds":["string"],"dependencies":[{"name":"string","version":"string"}]}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"code\":\"string\",\"input\":{\"property1\":null,\"property2\":null},\"integrationIds\":[\"string\"],\"dependencies\":[{\"name\":\"string\",\"version\":\"string\"}]}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/execute-script", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Resolve attachment tokens to presigned URLs

tokens.description: Array of attachment tokens to resolve

nameHints.description: Optional map of token -> filename for name hints

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/resolve-attachments \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"tokens":["string"],"nameHints":{"property1":"string","property2":"string"}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"tokens\":[\"string\"],\"nameHints\":{\"property1\":\"string\",\"property2\":\"string\"}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/chat/resolve-attachments", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
